'''√k-h-g''' ('''kahaga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:deacquisition|deacquisition]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-h-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deacquisition|deacquisition]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √k-h-g
|-
! Lemma
| kahaga
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || kahagithi || kahagiji || kahagishi || kahagi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || kahaguthuth || kahagujuj || kahagushush || kahag
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || kahaguthu || kahaguju || kahagushu || kahagu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || kahagufuth || kahagufuj || kahagufush || kahaguf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || kahagethe || kahageje || kahageshe || kahage
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || kahagothoth || kahagojoj || kahagoshosh || kahag
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || kahagotho || kahagojo || kahagosho || kahago
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || kahagofoth || kahagofoj || kahagofosh || kahagof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || kahagïf || kahagïf || kahagïf || kahagïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || kahagïfïf || kahagïfïf || kahagïfïf || kahagïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || kahagïf || kahagïf || kahagïf || kahagïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || kahagïf || kahagïf || kahagïf || kahagïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || kahagæthæ || kahagæjæ || kahagæshæ || kahagæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || kahagathath || kahagajaj || kahagashash || kahag
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || kahagatha || kahagaja || kahagasha || kahaga
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || kahagafath || kahagafaj || kahagafash || kahagaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || kahagasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || gokahagasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokikahagasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || kahagnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gokahagnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokikahagnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || kahagshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokahagnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokikahagshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || kahagroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gokahagnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokikahagroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || kahagmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gokahagnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokikahagmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || kahagsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gokahagnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokikahagsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || kahagngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gokahagnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokikahagngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || kahagyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gokahagnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokikahagyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || kahagyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gokahagnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokikahagyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || kahagnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokahagnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokikahagnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || kahagnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokahagnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokikahagnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || kahagnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokahagnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokikahagnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || kahagshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokahagnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokikahagshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || kahagshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokahagnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokikahagshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || kahagshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokahagnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokikahagshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || kahagronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokahagnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokikahagronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || kahagroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokahagnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokikahagroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || kahagromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokahagnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokikahagromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || kahagmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokahagnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokikahagmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || kahagmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokahagnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokikahagmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || kahagmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokahagnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokikahagmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || kahag
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || kæhæg
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || hokahag
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || hokæhæg
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohokahag
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohokæhæg
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nükahag
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nükæhæg
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünükahag
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünükæhæg
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïkahag
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïkæhæg
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïkahag
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïkæhæg
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || lukahag
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || lukæhæg
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || lulukahag
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lulukæhæg
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || likahag
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || likæhæg
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilikahag
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lilikæhæg
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kokahag
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kokæhæg
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokokahag
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokokæhæg
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kekahag
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kekæhæg
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekekahag
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekekæhæg
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
